title: DMOW-024 violent massage - Ayaka Lilith (Fujisaki Kuroe)
overview: Please try the "assault massage" introduced to men who are not healed by half-hearted massage. "You want me to hit you more? … Chi Po, please reply with “I’m not erect…” The happiness of being beaten by you, stepped on by you, abused by you, kicked by you, beaten by you, and looked down upon by you…. I ejaculate with a bizarre treatment by a noble esthetician...
